strengths: Complete mastery of required tech stack: TypeScript, React, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, and full-stack architecture demonstrated across multiple senior roles
Deep commitment to clean code practices (TDD, pair programming, software craftsmanship) that directly align with role values
Berlin-based with proven mentoring track record; demonstrates ability to elevate team capabilities through workshops and knowledge sharing
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch: Staff Engineer applying for entry-level role creates acute retention risk and potential role dissatisfaction
Current compensation expectations would far exceed junior/mid-level salary band, creating budget misalignment
Experience concentrated in specialized domains (GIS, microservices, real-time data) rather than renewable energy or construction technology sectors

key_factors.factor: Complete technical skill coverage and depth

response.justification: Okonkwo possesses exceptional technical depth across all required technologies and embodies the craftsmanship values the role seeks. However, current Staff-level seniority represents a fundamental misalignment with an entry-level position. This candidate would experience the role as a significant step backward in responsibility and compensation, creating substantial attrition risk. Better suited for mid-to-senior roles requiring full-stack mastery and architectural leadership.
